title: Map the MCC install tree — what lives where
prompt:
Using the MCC dump above, write '# MCC install tree recon' with these sections:

## top 5 largest files
List the 5 biggest files by size with their extensions.

## extension breakdown
Table-style bullet list: extension → count → total bytes.

## campaign map files
Which files look like Halo 2 campaign missions? (hint: .map files in the halo2 subdir).

## binary targets
Which files are the actual reverse-engineering targets? (dll + exe).

## ignored files
Which files should the reverse-engineer ignore for in-memory AI research? (videos, audio banks, textures).

No prose intro. Dense bullets. Numbers where possible.
